productDisplayName: Hanes Women Black Concealing Petals Strapless Bra
description: Style NoteFinally a brassiere that knows just what you need - light padding with the luxury of seamless comfort. This hanes brassiere promises "no show" which means, no more visible lines under that slinky satin party top or your favourite statement tee. Product DetailsBlack brassiere with demi-cupsBuilt-in ultra thin padded, under-wired, seamless cupsAdjustable, detachable shoulder straps (can be worn strapless, halter neck style or regular)Stretchy side wings with double hook and eye closure adjustable up to three notchesConcealing petals inside the cup to prevent it from showing throughMaterial and Care82% nylon and 18% spandexMachine wash warm with like coloursTumble dry low Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
